title: Man Infraconstruction is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Man Infraconstruction is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Man Infraconstruction, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Man Infraconstruction:
Man Infraconstruction is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Man Infraconstruction!
